artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Portable profile exported without raw secret material; rebind required on import.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: profile exports keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and acting identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Bind a new credential handle for this profile
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Profile import refused to deserialize prior secret material; a fresh handle bind is required.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Workflow bundle exported with credential metadata only; rebind required before install.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: workflow bundles keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Review bundle auth bindings before install
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Bundle install refused to reuse exported secret material; review and bind current handles first.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Portable-state package omits raw secret material and live authority; rebind required on restore.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: portable-state packages keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Rebind the required authority before restore
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Restore paused because the exported package preserved only handle metadata; raw authority did not travel.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Recipe export omitted raw credentials; rebind required before replay.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: recipe exports keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Recipe replay refused to reuse exported secret material; a new handle or delegated grant must be chosen.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Support bundle exported with omission markers for secret material.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: support bundles keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Open the typed repair or rebind flow
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Support replay keeps the omission visible and requires a fresh bind before any credentialed action resumes.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: AI evidence packet exported with redaction evidence and typed rebind posture.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: AI evidence packets keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Replay is incomplete because the evidence packet preserved only handle metadata; raw credentials were intentionally omitted.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Incident export omitted secret-bearing material and preserved the missing-span marker.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: incident exports keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Rebind credentials in the incident workspace
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Incident replay stops at a typed rebind step; the original secret material was never serialized into the export.

artifact_export_rules.omission_marker_label: Offboarding export omitted secret-bearing material and preserved bind requirements.
artifact_export_rules.omission_banner: Sensitive values excluded: offboarding exports keep credential aliases, handle classes, source labels, and consumer identity only.
artifact_export_rules.rebind_action_label: Bind replacement credentials on the destination device
artifact_export_rules.rebind_failure_label: Offboarding import refused to deserialize prior secret material; only rebind-safe metadata crossed the boundary.
